title: TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 001 - Checkmarx Scope Wider Than Reported,

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 001 - Checkmarx Scope 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/30
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*crates.io*'
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*models.litellm.cloud*'
            - '*sans.org*'
            - '*v1.82.6.rc*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
